title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, discusses his decision-making framework from competitive sailing and argues that ad-based monetization, not subscriptions, is the future for AI tools. He identifies human trust adoption, not technology, as the primary bottleneck for AI agents.
